payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Large bed with white and gray striped bedspread and matching pillows, set on a dark-stained wooden footboard; bed occupies most of the crop, sides are slightly edge-cropped and the top of the mattress and pillows are visible from a frontal viewpoint — approximate distance ~1.8 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"bed","short_description":"white-gray striped bedspread, dark footboard","long_description":"Large bed with white and gray striped bedspread and matching pillows, set on a dark-stained wooden footboard; bed occupies most of the crop, sides are slightly edge-cropped and the top of the mattress and pillows are visible from a frontal viewpoint — approximate distance ~1.8 m from camera.","attributes":["white and gray striped bedspread","matching pillows","dark stained wooden footboard","wooden headboard partially visible left","neatly made","large/king-size appearance","front-facing, low-angle view","sides slightly edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.8}
